content.text:
It looks like you're asking about HydraFacial treatments in Katy, Texas ("en" means "in" in Spanish, so I'll assume that's the intent—feel free to clarify if you meant something else!). HydraFacial is a popular non-invasive skincare procedure that cleanses, exfoliates, extracts impurities, and hydrates the skin using specialized serums and technology[[1]](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/hydrafacial)[[2]](https://luminousmedispa.com/hydra-facial). Based on recent web searches, there are several highly rated medspas and wellness centers in Katy offering this service. I'll highlight some top options below, including brief details and how to learn more. Prices and availability can vary, so I recommend contacting them directly for the latest info.

### Top Places for HydraFacial in Katy, TX
Here are some well-reviewed spots from sources like Yelp and local business sites (as of April 2026):

1. **Face to Face Spa** (at Cinco Ranch location)  
   Offers HydraFacial as part of their facial and skincare services, including options like Botox, chemical peels, and micro-needling[[3]](https://facetofacespa.com/cinco-ranch). It's frequently rated as a top choice on Yelp[[4]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Hydrafacial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX).  
   - Address: Near Cinco Ranch, Katy, TX (check their site for exact location).  
   - Website: [facetofacespa.com](https://facetofacespa.com/cinco-ranch)  
   - Specials: Often have packages combining HydraFacial with other treatments.

2. **Ageless MedSpa Katy**  
   Provides comprehensive HydraFacial treatments for facial rejuvenation, described as non-invasive and combining multiple techniques[[1]](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/hydrafacial).  
   - Address: Katy, TX (specifics on their site).  
   - Website: [agelessmedspakaty.com](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/hydrafacial)

3. **Restore Hyper Wellness**  
   Their HydraFacial service extracts impurities, exfoliates, and infuses restorative ingredients for radiant skin[[5]](https://www.restore.com/local/hydrafacial-tx-katy-tx014).  
   - Address: Katy, TX (book online).  
   - Website: [restore.com](https://www.restore.com/local/hydrafacial-tx-katy-tx014)

4. **Luminous MediSpa**  
   Specializes in HydraFacial for cleansing, exfoliating, extracting, and serum infusion, available in Katy and nearby Fulshear[[2]](https://luminousmedispa.com/hydra-facial).  
   - Address: Katy/Fulshear area.  
   - Website: [luminousmedispa.com](https://luminousmedispa.com/hydra-facial)

5. **4Ever Glow MedSpa**  
   Offers HydraFacial with specials like a $149 introductory glow treatment for new clients, plus other services like laser hair removal and body contouring[[6]](https://4everglowmedspa.com/home)[[7]](https://www.facebook.com/4everglowkaty).  
   - Address: Katy, TX.  
   - Website: [4everglowmedspa.com](https://4everglowmedspa.com/home)  
   - Note: They have a Facebook page for updates and reviews.

Other notable mentions from Yelp's top list include Medspa at Villagio, Wellness Spa - Katy, Shining Way Esthetics, and Viata Aesthetics and Wellness[[4]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Hydrafacial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX). Additional options like Allay Med Spa, Katy Med Tech Spa, and Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness also provide HydraFacial with positive feedback[[8]](https://www.allaymedspa.com/hydrafacial-treatment-skin-care-katy-tx)[[9]](https://katymedtechspa.com/?srsltid=AfmBOopNqLInEs7doCKx_-bol0SiAK5hOCimt2dZb-Pr76eSTcbh2QV7)[[10]](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/facials).

If you're looking for reviews, pricing, or bookings, sites like Yelp or the businesses' own pages are great starting points[[4]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Hydrafacial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX). For personalized advice, consult a licensed skincare professional. If this isn't what you meant or you need more details (e.g., costs or comparisons), let me know!
